context: Evaluates the execution of a systematic PR review: multi-pass analysis, severity classification, and identifying critical security/performance issues.

checklist.name: Multi-Pass Analysis
checklist.description: The agent explicitly performs multiple passes (e.g., Security, then Performance, then Style).

checklist.name: Identifies SQL Injection
checklist.description: Detects the critical security vulnerability in the SearchService (raw SQL with interpolation).

checklist.name: Identifies N+1 Performance Issue
checklist.description: Detects the performance issue in the controller (potential N+1 if products have associations).

checklist.name: Identifies Migration Risk
checklist.description: Detects that adding an index to a potentially large table should be done concurrently.

checklist.name: Severity Classification
checklist.description: Correctly classifies SQL injection as 'Critical' and style issues as 'Suggestions'.

checklist.name: Actionable Code Fixes
checklist.description: Provides the corrected code for the identified vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks.
